title: chrissi's Zoom
description: A lightweight client-side utility mod that allows you to zoom in by holding a keybind.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a46bc4fb6339d6ee387bec1f8eb32c9f733807a7.png)

chrissi's Zoom is a lightweight client-side utility mod that allows you to zoom in by holding a keybind.

---

**Please note:** This mod is Java Edition only and exclusively hosted on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/chrissi-zoom). The source code is available on [GitHub](https://github.com/chrissitxt/chrissi-zoom). If you'd like to get in touch, feel free to join my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/Qdk3TcDv6N).

<details>

<summary>How to Use</summary>

Hold **C** (default keybind) to zoom in. While zooming, use your **mouse wheel** to adjust the zoom level.

To change the keybind, go to **Options → Controls → Miscellaneous** and look for "Hold Zoom".

</details>
